title: rubus × adustus
intro: Rubus × adustus, a hybrid of the American black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus), is a type of bramble that is native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been shown to have numerous health benefits. The plant is rich in vitamins C and E, as well as other essential minerals, making it a valuable herbal remedy for a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. Rubus × adustus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or jam, with the berries being a popular ingredient in jams, preserves, and desserts.
